rationale: The citing paper mentions Mittal and Kamakura (2001) once in a grouped citation to support a general claim that customer satisfaction is associated with downstream cash flow/profitability outcomes. It is used as broad background in the satisfaction-profit chain framing, alongside several other studies, without any distinct discussion of its specific model, findings, or moderators. The cited work is not used to build unique hypotheses, operationalization choices, or empirical tests in the bond-market analysis.
